name: hCG Pregnancy Detection Kit
description: Clinically validated one-step urine pregnancy test with 99.9% accuracy.
uses: Detection of human chorionic gonadotropin (hCG) in urine for early pregnancy diagnosis.
sideEffects: No side effects for external diagnostic use. Results should be confirmed by clinical tests.
dosage: Collect mid-stream urine in a clean container; use dropper to place 3 drops on the test well.
storage: Store between 2°C to 30°C. Do not freeze. Keep out of sunlight.

name: Rivakold Multi-Symptom Tablets
description: Triple-action relief for cold, flu, and sinus congestion.
uses: Relief from common cold symptoms, fever, headache, and nasal congestion.
sideEffects: Mild drowsiness, dry mouth, or nausea in some patients.
dosage: 1 tablet twice daily after meals, or as directed by a practitioner.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct light and children.

name: RIVASYNE Anti-Fungal Cream
description: Dual-action antifungal and anti-inflammatory cream for skin infections.
uses: Treatment for athlete's foot, ringworm, and other fungal skin infections.
sideEffects: Temporary skin irritation or redness at the site of application.
dosage: Apply a thin layer to the affected area 2 times daily for 2-4 weeks.
storage: Store below 25°C. Keep the tube tightly closed after use.

name: Rivapro-ESR Probiotic Capsules
description: Advanced gut health formula with 3 billion live cultures per capsule.
uses: Maintenance of healthy gut flora and improved digestive immunity.
sideEffects: Initial mild bloating or gas as the gut microbiome adjusts.
dosage: 1 capsule daily before breakfast with plenty of water.
storage: Refrigeration recommended for maximum potency; keep in a cool place below 25°C.

name: Rivadol-AP Pain Relief Tablets
description: Fast-acting relief for joint and muscular pain.
uses: Powerful relief for joint inflammation, acute musculoskeletal pain, and swelling.
sideEffects: May cause gastric acidity or dizziness. Avoid taking on an empty stomach.
dosage: 1 tablet every 12 hours after food. Do not exceed 2 tablets in 24 hours.
storage: Store in a location inaccessible to children and pets.

name: RivaC Vitamin C 1000mg
description: High-potency immunity booster with effervescent delivery.
uses: Daily immunity boost. Helps in collagen synthesis and skin health.
sideEffects: Overconsumption may lead to mild stomach cramp and diarrhea.
storage: Store in airtight tube to prevent moisture absorption.

name: Rivazith Azithromycin 500mg
description: Broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic for respiratory infections.
uses: Clinical treatment for bacterial infections of throat, lungs, and skin.
sideEffects: Nausea, diarrhea, or temporary loss of taste.
dosage: 1 tablet daily for 3 days or as prescribed.
storage: Keep in a cool, dry place. Only use when prescribed by a doctor.

name: Rivaoxy Omega-3 Softgels
description: Pharmaceutical-grade fish oil for cardiovascular and brain health.
uses: Heart health maintenance and neurological support.
sideEffects: Mild fishy aftertaste. Take with food to minimize.
storage: Store in a cool place. Avoid exposure to high heat.

name: Rivagluco Monitor Kit
description: Clinical-grade blood glucose monitoring system with 5-second test time.
uses: Home-based monitoring of blood glucose levels for diabetic patients.
sideEffects: No chemical side effects. Minor prick discomfort.
dosage: Use once daily in the morning fasting state for tracking.
storage: Store strips in original container and keep meter dry.

name: Combiflam Plus Tablets
description: Effective for headache relief and body pain. Fast absorption formula.
uses: Relief from headache, toothache, and menstrual cramps.
sideEffects: Dizziness or gastric irritation if taken on empty stomach.
storage: Store in a dry place below 30°C.

name: Dettol Antiseptic 500ml
description: First aid for cuts, bites, and stings. Multi-purpose disinfectant.
sideEffects: Skin irritation if used undiluted on sensitive areas.
dosage: Dilute 1 part with 20 parts of water for topical use.
storage: Store away from children and open flames.

name: Sensodyne Rapid Relief
description: Clinically proven Toothpaste for sensitive teeth. 60-second relief.
uses: Relief from dental hypersensitivity and tooth decay protection.
sideEffects: No side effects for topical oral use.
dosage: Brush twice daily using a small amount on the toothbrush.
storage: Store at room temperature with cap closed.

name: Evion 400 Capsule
description: Supports immune system and skin health. Powerful antioxidant.
uses: Skin rejuvenation, immune support, and antioxidant intake.
sideEffects: Rare; may cause mild nausea if taken without food.
storage: Keep in a cool, dry place. Protect from heat.

name: Nurokind-LC Tablet
description: Treatment for nutritional deficiencies and nerve damage health.
uses: Management of neuropathic pain and peripheral neuropathy.
sideEffects: Muscle pain or diarrhea in rare instances.
dosage: As prescribed by a doctor, usually 1 tablet daily.
storage: Store below 25°C in a dry place.

name: Telma 40mg Tablet
description: Used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and heart health.
uses: Lowering high blood pressure and preventing cardiovascular risk.
sideEffects: Dizziness or back pain. Immediate medical help if swelling occurs.

name: Digital Infusion Glucose
uses: Primary source of energy and rehydration for fatigue or diarrhea.
sideEffects: No side effects if consumed in directed quantities.
storage: After opening, keep in an airtight container.
